comingSoon.heading: The field journal is being built
comingSoon.body: Log what happened in the field — irrigation, spraying, seeding, harvest, observations — so your sensor curves and analytics can be read in context. Entries anchor to a plot, capture the sensor snapshot at the moment of the activity, and appear as markers on your history charts.
comingSoon.captureBody: Six recent activities on a tap grid, product-first entry, and a plain-language confirmation line before every save.
comingSoon.recordBody: Structured, machine-readable entries per plot with frozen provenance — a detailed record designed for compliance profiles later.
comingSoon.syncBody: Every entry tells you whether it is saved on the farm gateway or waiting for it. Nothing is silently lost.

where.rangeOutOfStation: The range contains a plot outside this station.
where.rangeDuplicate: The station range repeats a value.
where.rangeNonInteger: The station range must use whole numbers.
where.rangeNonPositive: The station range must use positive numbers.

plot.heterogeneousGroup: The plot belongs to a heterogeneous group.

batch.duplicateBody: Review every duplicate candidate before saving this batch.

unavailable.title: Journal not available
unavailable.body: This gateway does not yet have the field journal. Update the gateway firmware to enable it.

error.title: Could not load the journal
error.body: The gateway did not answer successfully. Try again.

carry.repeatTreatmentDescription: Review the previous treatment before copying its protected fields
carry.invalidated: The previous treatment no longer matches this plot, crop, time, season, or layout
